summary: 3 pre-existing accessibility violations found across 4 pages; none introduced by CLV-003 (diff is limited to 3 OG meta tags in Layout.astro with no style changes), but the scoring rules require bounce for any error-severity findings regardless of origin.

findings.message: WCAG 2 AA color-contrast violation at /guide/ — foreground/background contrast below threshold.
WCAG 2 AA color-contrast violation at /start/ — foreground/background contrast below threshold.
WCAG link-in-text-block violation at /start/ — links in body text not distinguished from surrounding text without color.
